name: 揭露對質型
description: 女主拿出父親車內的出軌證據質問母親，將隱藏已久的家庭真相攤開，語言犀利且直擊痛點，推動劇情走向最終轉折。

examples.drama_title: 💗No One Dared Kiss the Bully CEO—Until a Rural Girl Did,Then He Can’t Stop Spoiling Her!#drama #ceo
examples.excerpt: I just want to know why you cheated on Dad, which caused his death when you knew his depression was really severe. / This is what I found in dad's car. What excuse do you have now?
